message:
feat(tui): add execute action handler for selected processes

TUI infrastructure (app.rs):
- Add execute_requested field to App state
- Add request_execute() and take_execute() methods mirroring
  the refresh pattern for execute actions
- Update confirm dialog to call request_execute() on Yes choice
- Update run_tui to use new run_tui_with_handlers signature

Main integration (main.rs):
- Import plan generation types (DecisionBundle, DecisionCandidate)
- Add plan_cache using Rc<RefCell<...>> for shared mutable state
- Replace run_tui_with_refresh with run_tui_with_handlers that takes
  separate refresh_fn and execute_fn callbacks
- Add build_plan_from_selection() to convert selected processes into
  an executable plan using cached candidates
- Refresh callback now updates plan_cache alongside rows

Module exports (mod.rs):
- Export run_tui_with_handlers

This enables the TUI to actually execute actions on selected processes
rather than just displaying them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
